discord.commands.link.label: link
discord.commands.link.description: Link your Discord account to the web account.
discord.commands.link.message: Use the button below to link your account.
discord.commands.status.label: status
discord.commands.status.notLinked: Your Discord account is not linked.
discord.commands.help.label: help
discord.commands.help.message: Use /link to connect your account and /status to check it.
discord.messages.rateLimited: Too many Discord actions. Please wait and try again.
discord.messages.authRequired: Link your account before using this Discord action.
discord.messages.linkConflict: This Discord account is already linked to another user.
